hero.title: Invites that delight before the party even starts
hero.subtitle: Create animated invites for weddings, birthdays, baby showers and more. Customize in minutes, share with a link and collect RSVPs.
hero.trust: No credit card. You only pay when you publish.

how.title: From invite to share in 3 steps
how.subtitle: That simple. Nothing to install, right from your browser.

step1.title: Pick a template
step1.desc: Start from one of the animated templates crafted for each kind of event.

step2.title: Customize
step2.desc: Edit text, colors, photos and the countdown in the live editor.

step3.title: Share
step3.desc: Publish and send the link over WhatsApp. Track who confirmed.

social.title: Thousands of invites already delighting guests

testimonials.title: People love it
testimonials.subtitle: Stories from those who made the invite part of the party.

items.name: Mariana Alves
items.quote: My guests thought I hired a designer. It looked stunning and took me 15 minutes.

items.name: Rafael Souza
items.quote: The animated confetti was a hit with the kids. And I tracked every RSVP in one place.

items.name: Camila Nunes
items.quote: The opening-curtain animation built the suspense. Worth every penny.

pricing.title: Pay only for the invite you publish
pricing.subtitle: Create and customize for free. You only pay when you decide to publish.
pricing.note: No subscription. You only pay when you publish.
features: QR code and add to calendar

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before creating your invite.

items.q: Do I have to pay to create the invite?
items.a: No. You create and fully customize it for free. Payment only happens when you decide to publish and share.

items.q: How do my guests receive the invite?
items.a: After publishing you get a unique link. Just send it over WhatsApp, Instagram or anywhere you like.
Yes. Each invite has a guest list with name, number of companions and a message.

items.q: Does the invite work on mobile?
items.a: Yes. Invites are 100% responsive and designed mobile-first.
You can. Adjust the text and details anytime from your dashboard.
Payments are processed by Kiwify, with credit card, Pix and bank slip.

finalCta.title: Your party deserves an invite to match
finalCta.subtitle: Create it now, for free. You only pay when you love the result.

footer.tagline: Animated digital invites for every moment.
